advice.summary: You are currently in the build phase of your training, focusing on consistency and strength. Your recent weight training sessions have been effective in supporting your endurance goals.
advice.focus: Incorporate more quality workouts into your running sessions to enhance speed and stamina.
advice.nextSession: Plan a quality running workout for this week, focusing on intervals or tempo runs to improve your pace.
advice.caution: Monitor your fatigue levels and ensure adequate recovery to prevent overtraining.
